brief_justification: Correct answer (storage) with valid theory-of-mind reasoning; Multi-level analysis tracking object locations across 4 scenes and Tom's epistemic state separately; Some self-monitoring via the reasoning context suppression of frame drift; Basic verification through the timeline table serving as a check on each scene; Acknowledges the critical detail about Tom not witnessing the move but doesn't explicitly state confidence levels; Implicitly considers the alternative (passenger seating area) by explaining why Tom wouldn't know about it; Full derivation trail with scene-by-scene table making the reasoning fully reproducible
